title: cosmianthemum bullatum
intro: Cosmianthemum bullatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the red-flowered cosmianthemum. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Cosmianthemum bullatum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Cosmianthemum bullatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat a range of conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
